reason: The image depicts a room in what appears to be the Santo Spirito hospital during its early years. Monks or friars in habits tend to beds. The architecture, clothing, furniture, and lighting generally correspond to the period. There are no visible anachronisms such as modern technology or clothing. The stone walls and rough-hewn timbers are appropriate for the time period. The large framed paintings on the wall appear anachronistic because the framing is too large, this is what lowers the score a bit.
